summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnHub course platform MVP. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with session persistence issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence issues - authentication cookies not maintained across page navigations

integration_issues.issue: Admin session lost when navigating to course management pages
Enrolled student tabs (Forum, AI Assistant) not visible due to session loss

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
User registration flow for student role
User login with admin credentials (admin@learnhub.com / admin123)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue - authentication cookies are not being maintained properly across page navigations. This prevents admin course management and student access to enrolled course features (forum, AI chat, quizzes). The issue appears to be with cookie handling or JWT token persistence in the frontend.
